name: Swift
summary: Apple 2014. iOS/macOS. Optional, ARC memory management, protocol-oriented.

facts.text: ARC: Automatic Reference Counting, không phải GC
protocol: như interface nhưng mạnh hơn — default impl, associated types
struct/enum là value types (copy) — phổ biến hơn C++

danger: ARC retain cycle: strong reference cycle → memory leak
